home.title: Fullstack TypeScript Template
home.description: A ready-to-extend baseline for Next.js, NestJS, shared contracts, auth, infrastructure, and design-system work.

contracts.title: Shared contracts
contracts.body: API envelopes, errors, pagination, IDs, env, and event contracts are centralized.

design.title: Design system
design.body: shadcn primitives stay separate from service-owned design-system components.

rename.title: Project rename
rename.body: Use the rename script to switch display name and slug while keeping @repo imports.

emptyState.title: Template scaffold is ready
emptyState.description: Create domain modules after the first product boundary is clear.
